---
title: "Archive"
toc: false
---

This page is a repository for my graduate school coursework. Some of these assignments are more polished than others, and some may not reflect the cleanest or most correct work I would produce now, but I am happy to host them here as living proof of my studies.

*Note that I did not draft these assignments under the impression that I would host them on the Internet forever.* Have mercy on me when you find my mistakes. (Also, if you're on this page, what are you doing?!)

## Fall 2023

- [Methods I](courses/methods-1.qmd)
- [Computational Statistics I](courses/computational-1.qmd)
- [Statistical Theory I](courses/theory-1.qmd)

## Spring 2024

- [Methods II](courses/methods-2.qmd)
- [Computational Statistics II](courses/computational-2.qmd)
- [Statistical Theory II](courses/theory-2.qmd)

## Summer 2024

- [Multivariate Analysis](courses/multivariate.qmd)

## Fall 2024

- [Bayesian Methods](courses/bayesian-methods.qmd)
- [Survival Analysis](courses/survival-analysis.qmd)

## Summer 2025

- [Categorical Data Analysis](courses/categorical-data-analysis.qmd)
- [Advanced Data-Driven Methods](courses/advanced-data-driven.qmd)
- [Bayesian Theory](courses/bayesian-theory.qmd)

## Fall 2025

- [Advanced Inference](courses/advanced-inference.qmd)
- [Spatial Statistics](courses/spatial-statistics.qmd)

## Spring 2026

- [Deep Learning](courses/deep-learning.qmd)
- [Statistical Bioinformatics](courses/statistical-bioinformatics.qmd)
